claims.subject: Priya Sharma
claims.evidence: zoom for demos, gong for call recording, slack, google calendar, a shared notion page where the team puts demo notes and competitive intel.
claims.object_value: Zoom, Gong, Slack, Google Calendar, Notion

claims.subject: Priya Sharma
claims.evidence: right now i spend maybe twenty minutes per demo digging through the merchant's website and sometimes their socials trying to figure out what they actually do and what they'd care about.

claims.subject: Priya Sharma
claims.evidence: if there were a way to just ask "give me a brief on this merchant before my eleven am demo" and get something useful, that's an hour of my day back.

claims.subject: Priya Sharma
claims.evidence: half the time i'm still guessing when the call starts.
claims.object_value: Insufficient merchant context at demo start

claims.subject: Priya Sharma
claims.evidence: when a lead skips me i'd like to know why. right now it's a black box.
claims.object_value: Lead routing is opaque; no visibility into why leads are not assigned
